sis02_energy — dependency graph

06:28 — Helen Marsh called you in early. She's a SCADA engineer doing scheduled maintenance at the Albion Energy Storage facility — 200 MWh of lithium-ion…

Loading…

Legend

Nodes

Room / area
Lock / interactive terminal
NPC / physical key
Inventory item / credential
VM challenge
VM flag (completion)
NPC conversation / action gate
Story aim (objective)
Critical path node
AND gate (all inputs required)
Container (holds items)
NPC (character in room)

Edges

Hard dependency (required)
Soft dependency / narrative unlock
Optional path

Shapes

Rounded rect — room
Rectangle — lock / VM challenge
Diamond — item / key / flag
Ribbon — conversation / action gate
Hexagon — story aim
Circle — AND gate

Critical Path — 8 hops

1. Understand the Facility State → 2. Conduct Battery Hall Walkdown → 3. Verify the Anomaly — Historian Trend → 4. Contact Marcus Webb and Investigate → 4b. Investigate the SIS Compromise → + → 5. Initiate Emergency Shutdown — ESD → + → 8. Make the NIS Notification
⚠️  Dashed aim arrows = narrative unlock only. A player with physical access to a room may complete an objective before the system unlocks that aim. Solid arrows indicate hard dependencies (AND gates, physical puzzle-lock chains). The critical path above shows the minimum mandatory sequence to reach mission completion.
